raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I was refunded {$300.00} from XXXX XXXX to a Citibank card that I no longer have ( card ending in * XXXX ). I contacted Citi customer service department several times via phone after this for a refund and was told that this would be handled ; however, nothing has been done. In XXXX, I received a letter asking me to resend an email, which is strange because I never sent one in the first place. I did follow up to send an email to their customer service on XX/XX/XXXX and I received a response XX/XX/XXXX, which was nonsensical as it referenced a previous letter, which I had never sent. 

I have attached all documentation below, which backs up my claim. 

This has been going on for almost five months. I would like this matter be addressed and that a refund check be sent to my address ASAP.
